name: mobile-code-companion-workspace
description: Control VS Code + Claude Code from your phone. Monorepo root: build orchestration only (no npm workspaces, so vsce packaging stays simple).

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix extension install && npm --prefix webapp install
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix extension run typecheck && npm --prefix webapp run typecheck
scripts.build: npm run build:webapp && npm run copy:webapp && npm run build:extension
scripts.package: npm run build && npm --prefix extension run package
